text_words.text: [unreadable fictional script - paragraph 3, ~3 lines, contains quoted terms in different brackets]

drawings.description: Simple hand-drawn stick figure: round head with a small filled dot (eye) in upper-left of head, straight vertical torso, two arms extending outward and slightly downward, two legs forming a V-shape. Drawn in solid black strokes, slightly irregular as if sketched by hand.

mixed_media_regions.description: Stick figure drawing located below all text blocks; centered horizontally at the bottom of the page. Acts as a visual sigil/illustration accompanying the page.

uncertain: Entire content of all four text paragraphs is in an undeciphered constructed/fictional script. Glyphs superficially resemble Armenian or Georgian letters but do not match any natural language alphabet I can identify.
Cannot confirm whether the '137' is a page number, a chapter/section reference, or has symbolic meaning in context.
The script may be a conlang, cipher, or stylized/ornamental typography — without a key it cannot be transcribed.
Specific punctuation marks within the body text (commas, semicolons, dashes) are ambiguous because they are formed from the same glyph set as the letters.
